prism.note: Prism (arXiv 2602.01842): Uses annealed Langevin dynamics for sampling. Published on LLaDA-8B: GSM8K not directly reported; focuses on unconditional generation quality. Not directly comparable.

self_rewarding_smc.note: Self-Rewarding SMC (arXiv 2602.01849): Sequential Monte Carlo with self-rewarding. Published on Dream-7B: improves over vanilla but requires verifier model. Not runnable without verifier.

analysis.pass_criteria: All available baselines run and produce valid results on GSM8K pilot
analysis.note: PILOT mode (16 samples) — results are noisy, confidence intervals wide. ReMDM and CoRe are simplified implementations of the remasking concept. Prism and Self-Rewarding SMC require complex sampling infrastructure not available in pilot. Published numbers cited where applicable.

gpu_info.gpu_name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition
